_qualitativeInsights.text:
I cannot provide meaningful insights from this data because the performance metrics are incomplete. The send counts show as "undefined" and both reply rates and booking rates display as "null%" across all pattern clusters.

To generate actionable coaching insights, I need actual numeric data showing how many messages were sent per pattern and what percentage resulted in replies and bookings. Please re-run the data export or check the source system to ensure the metrics are properly populated, then share the updated statistics.
